regional_cost_note: Christchurch rates are generally lower than Auckland. Expect $18–$28/m² for carpet installation including underlay. Vinyl plank (LVP) typically $22–$40/m² installed. Post-rebuild demand has kept a healthy local workforce with competitive pricing.

businesses.name: Floorarts
businesses.known_for: Expert supply and installation of carpet, carpet tiles, laminate, and vinyl flooring across Christchurch and the wider Canterbury region.

businesses.name: SMG FLOORING
businesses.known_for: Specialises in carpet installation, carpet stretching, vinyl plank flooring, and garage carpet across Christchurch and Canterbury.

businesses.name: Complete Carpet Installation Ltd
businesses.known_for: Carpet installation with 20+ years experience; offers free measure and quote and handles the full process from samples to completed install.

businesses.name: GSK Brothers
businesses.known_for: Residential and commercial carpet, laminate, vinyl, and hybrid flooring across Christchurch and greater Canterbury, with 218 completed jobs.

businesses.name: Carpets N More
businesses.known_for: Carpet wholesaler (domestic and overseas since 2018) offering supply and installation for renovations and smaller jobs at competitive prices.
